mapping.name: Broken Object Level Authorization
mapping.description: APIs expose endpoints that handle object identifiers, creating a wide attack surface for BOLA/IDOR.

mapping.name: Broken Authentication
mapping.description: Authentication mechanisms are complex and often implemented incorrectly.

mapping.name: Broken Object Property Level Authorization
mapping.description: Lack of or improper validation of object property level access.

mapping.name: Unrestricted Resource Consumption
mapping.description: API does not restrict size or number of resources that can be requested.

mapping.name: Broken Function Level Authorization
mapping.description: Complex access control policies with different hierarchies, groups, and roles.

mapping.name: Unrestricted Access to Sensitive Business Flows
mapping.description: APIs vulnerable to automated abuse of business flows.
mapping.note: Requires business logic context to detect

mapping.name: Server-Side Request Forgery
mapping.description: API fetches a remote resource without validating the user-supplied URL.

mapping.name: Security Misconfiguration
mapping.description: Improper configuration of API and supporting infrastructure.

mapping.name: Improper Inventory Management
mapping.description: APIs tend to expose more endpoints than traditional web applications.

mapping.name: Unsafe Consumption of APIs
mapping.description: Developers trust data received from third-party APIs more than user input.
